name: manage_task
description: Create, update, pause, resume, finish, or list task cards. Tasks are stored as JSON files in core/tasks/.

action.description: The action to perform. 'pause' = user-initiated stop; 'resume' = return to pending.

interval.description: Recurring interval in seconds. Omit or set to null for one-shot tasks (used with create/update).

progress.description: Update progress notes on the task.
